mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`financial_product` (product_category, product_name,target_type ,base_interest_rate, max_interest_rate, min_duration_months, max_duration_months, min_amount, max_amount, description, is_active,created_at,updated_at) VALUES (#{product.productCategory}, #{product.productName}, #{product.targetType}, #{product.baseInterestRate}, #{product.maxInterestRate}, #{product.minDurationMonths}, #{product.maxDurationMonths}, #{product.minAmount}, #{product.maxAmount}, #{product.description}, #{product.isActive}, #{product.createdAt}, #{product.updatedAt})
mapper.select:
SELECT product_id AS productId, product_category AS productCategory, target_type AS targetType, product_name AS productName, base_interest_rate AS baseInterestRate, max_interest_rate AS maxInterestRate, min_duration_months AS minDurationMonths, max_duration_months AS maxDurationMonths, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, description, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM `bank`.`financial_product` WHERE is_active = TRUE AND product_category = #{category} AND is_active = 1
AND target_type IN
#{item}
ORDER BY product_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `bank`.`financial_product` WHERE is_active = TRUE
AND product_category = #{category}

SELECT product_id AS productId, product_category AS productCategory, target_type AS targetType, product_name AS productName, base_interest_rate AS baseInterestRate, max_interest_rate AS maxInterestRate, min_duration_months AS minDurationMonths, max_duration_months AS maxDurationMonths, min_amount AS minAmount, max_amount AS maxAmount, description, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS upatedAt FROM `bank`.`financial_product` WHERE product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE `bank`.`financial_product`
product_category = #{product.productCategory},
product_name = #{product.productName},
target_type = #{product.targetType},
base_interest_rate = #{product.baseInterestRate},
max_interest_rate = #{product.maxInterestRate},
min_duration_months = #{product.minDurationMonths},
max_duration_months = #{product.maxDurationMonths},
min_amount = #{product.minAmount},
max_amount = #{product.maxAmount},
description = #{product.description},
is_active = #{product.isActive},
WHERE product_id = #{product.productId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `bank`.`task_processing_log` (task_id, member_id, action_type, processing_note, created_at) VALUES (#{log.taskId}, #{log.memberId}, #{log.actionType}, #{log.processingNote}, NOW())

INSERT INTO `bank`.`product_subscription` (user_id, product_id, task_id, amount, duration_months, status, applied_interest_rate, created_at) VALUES (#{sub.userId}, #{sub.productId}, #{sub.taskId}, #{sub.amount}, #{sub.durationMonths}, 'ACTIVE', #{sub.appliedInterestRate}, NOW())
